nasb.text: So the Jews were saying to the man who was cured, “It is the Sabbath, and it is not permissible for you to carry your pallet.”

esv.text: So the Jews said to the man who had been healed, “It is the Sabbath, and it is not lawful for you to take up your bed.”

cnv.text: 因此猶太人對那醫好了的人說：“今天是安息日，你拿著褥子是不可以的。”

ccb.text: 犹太人便对那人说：“今天是安息日，你不可拿着垫子走路。”

csbs.text: 所以那些犹太人对那得了痊愈的人说：“今天是安息日，你拿着垫子是不可以的！”
